creator: sylvio@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

This patch seems was applied, with only a change:

of:

post-patch:
         ${PERL5} -pi.orig -e 's/\x83\xf8\x5f\x0f\x84/\x83\xf8\x16\x0f\x84/' \
                 ${NXSRC}/lib/libXcomp.so.${PORTVERSION}

To:


do-build:
	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/\x83\xf8\x5f\x0f\x84/\x83\xf8\x16\x0f\x84/' \
		${NXSRC}/lib/libXcomp.so.${PORTVERSION}


Pallgone, do you can change of "do-build" to "post-patch" and try again?

Thanks.
